name: Your Oblivious Friend
description:
CW: Foot, Fart, Unaware Giantess Content

Oh no. You just simply laid down for a nap before having your friend Shae come over, but when you woke up, everything was HUGE. Hopefully Shae will be able to help you, that is.. will she even be able to see you?

Let me know of any requests you have 🙏
creator: MikeSpqm
